name: Honey Garlic Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks.
2. Slowly add the olive oil while whisking to make a basic mayonnaise. Add the oil very slowly at first to achieve the desired consistency.
3. Alternatively, use a food processor and add the oil ever so slowly.
4. Once the mayonnaise is made, add all ingredients except the vinegars.
5. Ensure the dressing is well mixed and ingredients are evenly distributed throughout.
6. Slowly stir in the tarragon vinegar and then the red wine vinegar, ensuring they are evenly blended.
7. Store the dressing in the fridge to prevent spoilage. Yield: 5 cups
